title: phyllanthus buxoides
intro: Phyllanthus buxoides, also known as the Box Leaf Phyllanthus, is a small, shrub-like plant that belongs to the family Phyllanthaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been attributed to its ability to reduce fever, treat digestive issues, and alleviate liver and kidney problems. The health benefits of Phyllanthus buxoides include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve immune function, and act as an anti-cancer agent. In herbal preparations, Phyllanthus buxoides is often made into teas, capsules, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
